title: Furnishing of medical services or advancing voluntary payments not admission of liability
doc_html:
§1204.  Furnishing of medical services or advancing voluntary payments not admission of liability

Neither the furnishing of medical services nor payments by the employer or his insurance carrier shall constitute an admission of liability for compensation under this Chapter.
doc_text:
§1204.  Furnishing of medical services or advancing voluntary payments not admission of liability
Neither the furnishing of medical services nor payments by the employer or his insurance carrier shall constitute an admission of liability for compensation under this Chapter.
